feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SBO_SP_TransactionNotification
entry.content:
Is it possible to make blocking in SBO_SP_TransactionNotification only work in the Data Transfer Workbench? 

SAP Business One

entry.title: Is it Possible to insert data, when AR Invoice is Added manually/through DI API in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an Requirement to Insert the AR Invoice Data to a Table When an AR Invoice is added manually/through DI API in sap b1. How to handle this.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Sap B1 Hana SP 2402 Registering B1WebServer into SLD returned error
entry.content:
Hello,

I am encountering an issue with SAP Business One HANA SP 2402 where I receive an error stating "Registering B1WebServer into SLD returned error" while attempting to register the B1WebServer in the Service Layer Directory (SLD). What steps can I take to resolve this issue? Has anyone else faced this during installation and found a solution?

Details:

  • Running on SAP Business One HANA SP 2402
  • The error occurs during the installation phase
  • SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15 SP3

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Financial Template Import Wizard
entry.content: I need to know with examples how to import a "Financial Template" using the "Financial Template Import Wizard" as there are no references, videos or documentation for this feature and I need it for one of my customers.

entry.title: Import from Excel_Business Partner master data_Bank
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I tried to import from Excel with the template including Bank info. But the error with the bank information. I can add a new record without bank info.
Please help me to check it. The bank info contains the predefined info.

entry.title: ServiceLayer query allowlist for UDT/UDO
entry.content:
Hello everybody, 

 

 

I have a problem with the allowlist from the query service layer. For example, if I want to post the following query:



{
"SqlCode": "U_CS_PROD5",
"SqlName": "U_CS_PROD5",
"SqlText": "SELECT T0.Code FROM [@CS_BDE_MAIN] T0"

}


Then I get the response:

{
"error": {
"code": 702,
"message": {
"lang": "en-us",
"value": "Table '@CS_BDE_MAIN' not accessible"
}
}
}

 

 


I defined the table in the allowlist like this:

First test:
@CS_BDE_MAIN
Second test:
[@CS_BDE_MAIN]
Third test
CS_BDE_MAIN

Afterwards I always restarted the service layer.

However, I still get the same error message.

Do you have any idea what that could be?


Thank you very much

Levin

entry.title: SAP B1 on Hana - Dirty Read - Service Layer Analytical view
entry.content:
Hi guys, we have the following scenario:

- We create a Analytical view and expose it on service layer.

- The view exposed is used by a third party app to read the jornals entries.

We detect than the view exposes non commited journal lines . It means than, if you consume the endpoint during a database transaction (posting a large jornal for example), some journals can are present unbalanced (some lines are not showen).

We test this scenario over an UDT, and we found the same behavior.

Could someone tell me how to avoid dirty reading in a view (or analytical view) HANA 2.0?

Regards,

 

Gustavo

entry.title: SAP Business One Matching Criteria in Bank Statment Processing
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a query, I have a scenrio with SAP Business One Bank Statment Processing.

Let's say I have a balance of 100 in the incoming payments, the system automatically populates all the AR Invoices/Incoming Payments open documents which have a balance of 100. Now to avoid manually selecting as per going through the bank statement. I want the system to automatically select the AR Invoice/Incoming Payment which is there in the bank statement line item. I have worked with Matching Criteria only the Balance Amount is working and the rest is not. 

Any inputs.

With Regards,

Samudra Gupta

entry.title: Connection failed error into SAP Business One Mobile application
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have followed all the configuration part but SAP B1 mobile application is not working.

We have done configuration into SAP and into integration framework like JDBC, B1DI. Also generate the certificate from the integration framework and deployed this certificate into mobile device but application is not working.

Facing error like "connection failed" while login into SAP B1 Mobile application 

SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2008

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Duplicate business partner authorization
entry.content: SAP Business One should have authorization for the 'Duplicate Business Partner' option. Just like 'Duplicate documents and records' authorization.

entry.title: Find Order # for an Invoice
entry.content:
We just implemented SAP - Business One on 01/08/2024. I am creating a query to find all invoices that were produced for a given month.  The only thing I can't figure out is how to find the associated sales order number for an invoice.

I was told by our trainers that there was no way to do that because the sales order # is only stored as a comment on the invoice header.

Any help is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Item Cost of Item
entry.content:
Hi
 
Is it possible that for a particular Item cost should always be 0. We have checked Stock release without item cost.
 
Thanks

entry.title: Printing Error: Full Document could not be printed: reduce the top and bottom margin (RPT-6723)
entry.content:
I'm getting an error in generating a crystal report while I'm using an Item Batch in GRPO
Printing Error: Full Document could not be printed: reduce the top and bottom margin (RPT-6723) (message 200-38)

entry.title: Connection failed error into SAP Business One Mobile application
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have followed all the configuration part but SAP B1 mobile application is not working.

We have done configuration into SAP and into integration framework like JDBC, B1DI. Also generate the certificate from the integration framework and deployed this certificate into mobile device but application is not working.

Facing error like "connection failed" while login into SAP B1 Mobile application 

SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2008

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: How can we apply a Transaction Notification on HSN and SAC Master Data in SAP Business One?
entry.content:
Hi,

Can we apply a Transaction Notification on HSN and SAC Master Data in SAP Business One? We want to put some validations in these tables - cannot leave it open to users to add anything as they please.

entry.title: How to get actual stock quantity and it's actual warehouse BIN location ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to get warehouse report with SDK or Service or maybe SQL?

I want to see actual bin locations and it contained item card and quantity.

I found some SQL samples here but it shows DefauldbinLocaiton of item card. But I may put the items other bin locations from their default.

Shortly, How many items consist in the warehoue bin locations address?

Regards,

Mucip:)

entry.title: Can I download SAP Business One 10 without S-User ID?
entry.content: How I download SAP Business One 10 Trial version without S-User ID?

entry.title: Define stocklevels for multiple warehouses
entry.content:
Hi All,

We use multiple warehouses for our items and would like to define stocklevel data (minumum, maximum, order quantity) per warehouse.
Currently SAP B1 has one set of stocklevel data on item level that is applicable for all warehouses combined.

Does anyone know how to do this ?

Best regards, Vincent

entry.title: The server threw an exception. (exception from hresult: 0x80010105 (rpc_e_serverfault)) in sap b1
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

Sometime following error occured while loading form through xml in sdk addon. If you are facing same issue as "the server threw an exception. (exception from hresult: 0x80010105 (rpc_e_serverfault)) in sap b1" in design mode while preview form (b1studio) or in addon. do the following steps

01. Open xml form in B1 Studio

02. Change Type of the form from Form Properties. it should not be same as form uid property.

 

Best regards,

Mahendrakumar D.P.

entry.title: SAP Learning Groups
entry.content:
I created a UDF field (Business Partner Master Data) at row level on the delivery note but when added the DN data is disappeared. Basically, I need to link business partner data at row level to obtain some additional data from the OCRD table on my delivery note layout. 

Looking for help on this

Thanks in advance
